name: skyecho-backend-v1-1-ai-traffic-orchestrator
description: SkyEchoCabin Backend AI Traffic Orchestrator with CSV world data, sequencing, ADS-B websocket stream, and ATC radio event queue.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && find src -name '*.js' -not -path 'src/index.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
